description_long: This is a modern bunk bed constructed primarily from light-colored wood, featuring a robust rectangular frame with clean, straight lines. The bed includes two sleeping platforms, one above the other, with the upper bunk protected by high side panels for safety. A dark wooden ladder is attached to the side, providing access to the upper bunk, and is visually distinct from the lighter frame. Underneath the lower bunk, there are two spacious pull-out drawers for storage, each with a recessed handle for easy access. The ends of the bed are solid panels, one of which is slightly curved, adding a subtle design element. The overall appearance is functional yet stylish, suitable for urban apartments or shared living spaces.
description: A modern, light-wood bunk bed with a dark ladder and two large pull-out storage drawers beneath. The design is clean, functional, and features a curved end panel for added style.
description_view_0: Front view showing both bunks, the dark ladder, and two pull-out drawers beneath the lower bunk.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bed, the solid end panel, and one drawer pulled out for visibility.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel, the open space beneath the upper bunk, and the ladder partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the curved end panel, the bunk structure, and the drawers pulled out on this side.
